name: Big Joe Turner
abstract: Joseph Vernon "Big Joe" Turner Jr. (May 18, 1911 – November 24, 1985) was an American blues shouter from Kansas City, Missouri.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Count Basie and His Orchestra
Kool Jazz Festival: An Evening with Joe Williams and Friends

quotes.text: During World War Number Two. And, uh, we were runnin' back and forth to New York an' all over the country. Gettin' back to New York, I was uh...forgot to tell you that the first blues show that ever was at Carnegie Hall, John Hammond gave it, an' I was on the show. Had Big Bill from Chicago, a host of other blues singers... Big Bill had on some tight shoes were hurtin' his feet. He would stand up on the stage playin' and cryin'.
quotes.caption: Joe Turner recalls the first blues show at Carnegie Hall

quotes.text: Carnegie Hall in New York City, I went back to Cafe Society, while we were workin' there, and I stayed there so long until that I was one of the fixtures in the place, so I finally took off and went to Indianapolis.
quotes.caption: Mentions Carnegie Hall while discussing Cafe Society tenure

quotes.text: Yeah, we played Carnegie Hall a coupla years ago.
quotes.caption: Vague recollection of playing Carnegie Hall years ago

about_quotes.speaker: Wallace Davenport
about_quotes.evidence: That's when I first met Big Joe Turner. He came there as a singer.

about_quotes.speaker: Eddie Durham
about_quotes.evidence: Joe Turner would sing and Jo Jones would have his snare drum... that was another job. We used to work there until about 7:00 the next morning... that's where I first met him, and we used to play like that.

about_quotes.speaker: Cliff Leeman
about_quotes.evidence: I made an all time record that's considered an all time jazz collector's item with Joe Turner Sings the Blues on Atlantic Records... the date was Joe Turner's... I fit in on that date

about_quotes.speaker: Pierre Boussaguet
about_quotes.evidence: I got so lucky to be around all these old musicians... I played a few tunes one time with Big Joe Turner.
about_quotes.doc_title: Pierre Boussaguet interviewed by Matthieu Jaffre, Aix en Provence, France, July 28, 2020

about_quotes.speaker: Ram Ramirez
about_quotes.evidence: Joe Turner was an influence in my life... He was a real buddy when I was young. He was very encouraging.

about_quotes.speaker: Buck Clayton
about_quotes.evidence: We went over for the State Department. Just Joe Turner and I. We went from England over there to play.
